description_long: This object is a stone memorial obelisk integrated into a low, weathered stone wall. The central vertical slab rises above the wall and features a large, inscribed plaque at the top, with a decorative relief panel below, framed by two columns and an arched pediment. The base area is cluttered with several smaller, flat grave markers and fragments, some leaning against the wall. The stonework is aged, with visible erosion, discoloration, and patches of moss or lichen. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by grays and off-whites, with some yellowish and brownish tones from weathering. The structure appears to be a historical monument, likely found in a cemetery or park.
description: A weathered stone memorial obelisk set into a low stone wall, featuring an inscribed plaque, decorative relief, and several smaller grave markers at its base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full inscribed plaque, decorative relief with columns, and multiple smaller grave markers at the base.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thickness of the central slab and the wall, with less detail visible on the relief and base.
description_view_2: This angled view highlights the depth of the relief and the arrangement of the grave markers along the base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the edge of the plaque and relief, as well as the distribution of the smaller markers.
attribute_inscription: A large, rectangular inscription is present on the upper portion of the central slab, featuring engraved text in a serif style. The language appears to be English, but the text is partially eroded and not fully legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative relief with two columns and an arched pediment is present below the inscription, featuring classical motifs and sculpted details.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of a rough stone platform integrated with the wall, with several smaller, flat grave markers and fragments arranged in front and leaning against the wall. The base is irregular and weathered.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, flat-topped extension of the central slab, with no additional ornamentation or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: Several smaller grave markers and stone fragments are immediately in front of the obelisk, all set against a low, weathered stone wall.
